# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  vmName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: webapp-vm
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    defaultValue: azureuser
  adminPassword:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Passw0rd123!
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: East US
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_B2s

variables:
  imagePublisher: Canonical
  imageOffer: UbuntuServer
  imageSku: 18.04-LTS
  osDiskName: osdisk
  dataDiskName: datadisk

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: 2020-06-01
  name: vnet
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
        - 10.0.0.0/16
    subnets:
      - name: subnet
        properties:
          addressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/24

- type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
  apiVersion: 2020-06-01
  name: publicip
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
  apiVersion: 2020-06-01
  name: nic
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/vnet
    - Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses/publicip
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
      - name: ipconfig1
        properties:
          subnet:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', 'vnet', 'subnet')]"
          publicIPAddress:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', 'publicip')]"

- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  apiVersion: 2020-06-01
  name: "[parameters('vmName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/nic
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
    osProfile:
      computerName: "[parameters('vmName')]"
      adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
      adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
    storageProfile:
      imageReference:
        publisher: "[variables('imagePublisher')]"
        offer: "[variables('imageOffer')]"
        sku: "[variables('imageSku')]"
        version: latest
      osDisk:
        name: "[variables('osDiskName')]"
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
        createOption: FromImage
        diskSizeGB: 30
      dataDisks:
        - lun: 0
          name: "[variables('dataDiskName')]"
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
          createOption: Empty
          diskSizeGB: 100
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'nic')]"
